name: Maron 2022 Tadalafil COPD-PH Veterans Exercise Capacity Extract
population_or_context: Older male veterans with COPD-associated pulmonary hypertension.
methods: Multicenter placebo-controlled randomized trial of tadalafil 40 mg/day for 12 months with 6MWD primary endpoint and pulmonary hemodynamic/dyspnea secondary endpoints.
population_profile: Older male veterans with COPD-PH; disease-specific and older than the primary target population.
study_design: Multicenter placebo-controlled randomized trial with under-enrollment and imbalanced randomization.
safety_findings: No significant difference in major adverse events; tadalafil was reported as well tolerated overall.
directness_to_target_population: Low for healthy men age 30 to 50; useful for disease-specific pulmonary exercise-capacity boundary.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Under-enrollment, imbalanced randomization, older disease population, and limited power.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but COPD-PH pathophysiology and 40 mg daily exposure do not establish healthy-user exercise benefit.
